_metadata.purpose: Refresh of all 12 publicly known Dynamo partners. Last verified March 14, 2026 — this updates with everything from late March through early May. Pipeline-ready for guide cards, listicles, and recurring 'What's Mrs. ___ Up To' content blocks.
headline_finds: Isy Bella Bond is competing on Amazon Prime's Beast Games Season 2 ($5M prize)
Wiktoria Wychowska (Bogusz) is pregnant with their first daughter, engaged on a yacht in Mykonos June 2025
Rachel Lima met Artur on TINDER when he was at Columbus Crew
Anne Sviatchenko owns a beauty clinic in Denmark (Klinikken Skøn) — two kids, married June 2017
Brooke Holmes is a working MUA — kids named Thiago Albie and Bonnie
Fiorella Curutchet wedding date: December 1, 2022 — son Salvador rocks Vélez kits
Lucie Lingr's son Mikuláš was born Feb 2025

Isy_Bella_Bond.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: Isy is competing on AMAZON PRIME'S BEAST GAMES SEASON 2 — chasing the $5 MILLION prize. Show released January 2026 and she's been actively promoting throughout the spring. This is a literal celebrity moment for the Dynamo WAG circle.
Isy_Bella_Bond.kids: At least one child (toddler-age based on April 2026 'Mommy loves you' family content)
Isy_Bella_Bond.recent_activity_since_march_14: Solo-getaway-then-back-to-family content; Beast Games Season 2 promo posts (ongoing); Texas sun vibes; camera-roll dumps March-May 2026
Isy_Bella_Bond.girlfriend_guide_angle: We have a Mr Beast Games contestant in the WAG section. Card idea: 'Will Isy Win The $5 Million?' — we follow her Beast Games arc all season.

Wiktoria_Wychowska.ig_bio: ʜᴏᴜꜱᴛᴏɴ ᴛx / ᴋᴀᴛᴏᴡɪᴄᴇ ᴏᴡɴᴇʀ @no13.pilates Certified Pilates Instructor
Wiktoria_Wychowska.career_or_business: OWNS no13.pilates studio (Houston + Katowice), certified Pilates instructor, former personal trainer and nutritionist
MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: PREGNANT with their FIRST DAUGHTER — announced January 2026, no birth reported as of May 2 (so a Houston-born baby imminent)
Engaged June 2025 ON A YACHT in MYKONOS, GREECE
Got married 'after the engagement' — exact date and location TBC
Wiktoria_Wychowska.how_they_met: Both from Silesia, Poland — he's from Ruda Śląska, she's from Katowice. Met at home before he moved abroad.
Wiktoria_Wychowska.recent_activity_since_march_14: Houston-tagged posts April 9, April 18, April 28, 2026. Pilates studio content. Baby-bump-era lifestyle content.
Wiktoria_Wychowska.girlfriend_guide_angle: Pregnant Polish Pilates entrepreneur who got proposed to on a yacht in Mykonos. That's not a WAG, that's a romcom protagonist. Card idea: 'Bump Watch: Bogusz Baby Bingo' — track studio posts, doctor visits, name guesses.

Anne_Rudmose_Sviatchenko.career_or_business: Former Danish pro footballer (and Celtic Women player when Erik signed for Celtic in 2016) → now a certified medical-grade cosmetologist and OWNER of SKØN beauty clinic (Klinikken Skøn) in Viborg, Denmark
Anne_Rudmose_Sviatchenko.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: Met Erik when she was 14, through his sister. Together 18 years as of 2025. MARRIED JUNE 2017 in Viborg, Denmark.
Anne_Rudmose_Sviatchenko.kids: Son William (turned 10 on April 2, 2026) and daughter Clara (turned 7 in early March 2026)
Anne_Rudmose_Sviatchenko.recent_activity_since_march_14: Erik posted William's 10th birthday content April 2, 2026 (Anne tagged). Clinic content rolling.
Anne_Rudmose_Sviatchenko.girlfriend_guide_angle: Pro footballer turned beauty-clinic owner. Husband's dad is a fashion-photography legend. The Sviatchenkos are basically a Scandinavian power dynasty. Card idea: 'Pitch to Parlor' — Anne's Klinikken Skøn product picks.

Brooke_Holmes.career_or_business: Working makeup artist (MUA) AND UGC content creator
Brooke_Holmes.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: Two kids: son THIAGO ALBIE (toddler) and daughter BONNIE HOLMES (baby). Wedding history goes back to at least March 2022 (anniversary post). Most recent anniversary marker June 2025 (4th anniversary).
Brooke_Holmes.recent_activity_since_march_14: UGC creator reel comments mid-April 2026; family content in steady stream
Brooke_Holmes.girlfriend_guide_angle: MUA + Mama. Houston has its own glam squad on the WAG bench. Card idea: 'WAG Beauty Secrets' — Brooke's Brooke-Savannah-MUA looks tagged with the products she uses.

Preslee_Clark.career_or_business: Luxury Houston makeup & hair stylist (presleeclarkartistry — bridal sparkle territory)
Preslee_Clark.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: Pitch-side photo with Lawrence after the SAN DIEGO WIN (April 22, 2026). Caption-coded posts: 'Big fan of #11' (Ennali wears 11). Confirmed couple-content era.
Preslee_Clark.recent_activity_since_march_14: April: '2026 so far' carousel; mid-April little-moments dump; 'march was cute' carousel; 'Big fan of #11' couple content; pitch-side after Houston-SD win
Preslee_Clark.girlfriend_guide_angle: Bridal-glam Houston artist who shows up to games. Card idea: 'Post-Game Glow-Up' — Preslee's tunnel/post-match looks tied to game results.

Rachel_Lima.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: RACHEL AND ARTUR MET ON TINDER while he was playing for Columbus Crew. They got married in 2019. Daughter born around September 2022 (so ~2.5-3 years old now).
Rachel_Lima.kids: At least one daughter (no public name — referred to as 'nossa pequenina')
Rachel_Lima.recent_activity_since_march_14: No specific public posts surfaced — likely a low-public-activity account
Rachel_Lima.girlfriend_guide_angle: TINDER. They met on TINDER. He swiped right at Columbus Crew, married her in 2019, brought her to Houston, made a baby. The dating-app fairy tale of MLS. Card idea: 'How Did They Meet?' — running listicle of all the meet-cutes (Tinder, college, etc.) we can verify.

Bru_Senna.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: TWO daughters: ANTONIA and ALICE. Alice recently turned 8 (around late March/early April). Couple has been married approximately 9 YEARS.
Bru_Senna.recent_activity_since_march_14: Husband posted preseason excitement, Alice's 8th birthday (~late March/early April), family tributes, Dynamo new-season content
Bru_Senna.girlfriend_guide_angle: Girl-dad paradise. 9 years married, two daughters, Brazilian roots. Card idea: 'The Dynamo Dad Power Rankings' — who's the most aggressive girl-dad on the roster?

Fiorella_Curutchet.career_or_business: Argentine PE teacher / fitness coach (history at gyms BIGG Fit, Kinexis, Curves)
Fiorella_Curutchet.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: MARRIED DECEMBER 1, 2022 in an intimate ceremony. Son SALVADOR BOUZAT CURUTCHET (2-3 yrs old) is already photographed in Vélez Sarsfield kits — generational Vélez fan in the making. April 25, 2026 IG post: 'Encontré el mejor partner del mundo' ('I found the best partner in the world'). Late April family photo: 'Estos dos ❤️.'
Fiorella_Curutchet.kids: Son Salvador. Possibly a second on the way / second tot ('enano de mi corazón' phrasing in another post)
Fiorella_Curutchet.recent_activity_since_march_14: April 25 partner post; April 29 family photo; late-April son's birthday content; championship celebrations for Bouzat's titles; beach vacation hints
Fiorella_Curutchet.girlfriend_guide_angle: Argentine PE teacher who married her champion midfielder, raises a son already kitted out in the rival's colors, and posts the kind of WAG content we live for. Card idea: 'Toddler Kits Power Rankings' — which Dynamo player's kid has the best kit drip?

Lucie_Lingr.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: Son MIKULÁŠ born mid-FEBRUARY 2025 (~14 months old now). Couple has been together since Ondřej's MFK Karviná days (~2017). Wedding was JUNE 2024 — JUST BEFORE EURO 2024. Family relocated to Houston March 2025 with the Dynamo move.
Lucie_Lingr.recent_activity_since_march_14: Mom-life content (account is mommy-lifestyle focused). No standout public moments recently surfaced.
Lucie_Lingr.girlfriend_guide_angle: Czech expat mama, married a footballer right before he played a Euros, raising baby Mikuláš in Texas. Card idea: 'Houston via ___' — featurette mapping where each WAG came from.

Martina_Madeo.ig_bio: pure heart, free spirit born of winter❄️ MDCIII ♊︎
Martina_Madeo.kids: Two young kids per a 2024 report; details thin
Martina_Madeo.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: Together since at least 2017 (back to Ponce's Lille days in France). Profile is locked down — she's the most-private WAG on the roster.
Martina_Madeo.girlfriend_guide_angle: The locked-down-IG ex-Lille WAG. We respect the privacy. Hint at her existence; don't try to crack it.

Anna_Samassékou.ig_handle: Unable to verify — private or no public account
Anna_Samassékou.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: Two kids: son (~2 years old, ~26 months as of January 2026) + daughter (~12 months as of January 2026). So they had two babies very close together.
Anna_Samassékou.girlfriend_guide_angle: Lowkey French-Malian power family. Soft mention only — respect the privacy.

Andrianna_Vines.ig_handle: Unable to verify — no confirmed public profile
Andrianna_Vines.MASSIVE_NEW_TEA: Vines's fiancée was referenced in a 2024 Colorado Rapids article ('It Was a Good Time to Come Back') — they were engaged at that point. She maintains zero verifiable public presence.
Andrianna_Vines.girlfriend_guide_angle: Master of staying off-grid in a world obsessed with WAG content. Lean on Sam's 'revenge match vs Colorado' angle for tonight instead.
